global.description: The ad features a bright yellow background with a clear offer for fast food delivery.
global.main_message: Order fast food with free delivery over $15.

elements.label: Yellow background
elements.description: A solid yellow background that fills the entire canvas, providing a bright and cheerful base for the ad.

elements.label: FreshDash logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'FreshDash' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top center of the ad.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Bold black text stating 'Fast food, fast' that is prominently displayed in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small badge with the text 'SALE' in white on a contrasting background, located at the top right corner.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small text area displaying the price '€9.99' in a clear, readable font, positioned near the top of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Order now' in bold, inviting font, located at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Fast food, fast Free delivery over $15 €9.99 Order now

elements.label: FreshDash logo
elements.description: A small logo featuring the text 'FreshDash' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top left of the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small badge with the text 'SALE' in white on a contrasting background, located at the top right corner.
